Event: Experimental Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 05/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR408
Fiery Inventor Plate Mail

Once every 9 sec., the unit removes 5 random negative effects from self and increases the maximum health, physical and magic armor by 70% for 5 sec. For that duration, enemy units receive pure damage equal to 8% of the armor wearer's maximum health once every 1 sec. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The unit restores health equal to 35% of the damage dealt by the ability. The enemy units that received damage from it will have their damage, physical and magic armor reduced by 10% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 8 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
